name: Chickpea Couscous
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, sauté onions and peppers in the vegetable stock until tender.
2. Add potatoes, chickpeas, raisins, zucchini, tomato paste, coriander, cumin seed, cayenne pepper, garlic, paprika, and white wine to the pot. Stir well.
3. Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 35 minutes, or until all vegetables are tender.
4. Meanwhile, prepare the couscous according to the package instructions.
5. Let the vegetables stand for 10 minutes before serving.
6. Serve the vegetable mixture over the cooked couscous.
